feat.name: Unseat
feat.text: With a mighty blow from atop your companion, you attempt to knock an opponent off their mount. Make a melee Strike against a mounted creature. If your attack hits, attempt an Athletics check against the target’s Fortitude DC. If you succeed, the target is knocked off its mount into a space of its choice adjacent to its mount. If you critically succeed, the target also lands prone.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.requirement: You are riding your mount and wielding a Jousting weapon.
